overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and ancient stone ruins, with a moody blue atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with grassy clearings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path surrounded by tall grass and trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
tall green grass lining both sides of the path
dense forest trees with green foliage
dark blue night sky visible through tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through an open forest area at night. Tall grass and dense deciduous trees line both sides of the trail, with a dark blue night sky visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with ancient stone ruins

events.description: stone wall ruin appears on the right side of the path
ancient stone archway becomes visible on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing by stone ruins and a large gnarled tree

entered.detail: low stone wall made of grey rocks running alongside the path
large stone archway structure resembling ancient ruins
massive twisted tree with sprawling branches ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads past ancient stone ruins including a low stone wall on the right and a large stone archway on the left. A massive gnarled tree dominates the center of the view as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with path junction

events.description: character turns right at a path junction to follow the main trail

agents.ego_description: approaching a junction in the path and turning right to continue through denser forest

entered.detail: intersection where the forest path splits into two directions
white-barked birch trees visible among the darker forest trees

segments.scene_description: Leaving the stone ruins behind, the character continues through denser forest vegetation. The path reaches a junction around 45 seconds where the character turns right, proceeding past birch trees with white bark visible in the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, atmospheric forest that transitions from open woodland into a dense thicket of ancient ruins. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by tall grass and deciduous trees under a deep blue night sky. As the trail progresses, the environment shifts to include weathered stone ruins, passing a low wall and a large archway before centering on a massive, gnarled tree. The scene then moves beyond the ruins into thicker vegetation, where the path reaches a junction and turns right. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the woods, passing a cluster of white-barked birch trees that stand out against the surrounding darkness.
